research_history_boundary.claim: NWE-7 is a new continuous weak-signal model, not a threshold repair; 2024+ remains sealed until all pre-2024 gates pass

novelty_boundary.economic_axis: weekly price-independent network economics decoder combining weak blockspace-demand and ledger-topology states
not: tail-event threshold repair of NTB-7 or BFC-3
BTC price, return, volatility, extrema, wick, or volume as model input
funding, premium, basis, OI, Kimchi, DXY, FX, REX, or Markov input

source_contract.revision_boundary: raw on-chain values use AssetEODCompletionTime and frozen hashes, but are not a full historical revision-vintage archive; live promotion requires forward-vintage parity
source_contract.excluded_for_leakage_risk: Coin Metrics exchange-tag flows are excluded without point-in-time tags

causal_feature_contract.level_features: strictly-prior 180-observation z-score of each raw state; require 120
causal_feature_contract.change_features: strictly-prior 180-observation z-score of each raw state's seven-day change
causal_feature_contract.availability: merge sources by observation date, use max available_at, and include only reference observations published strictly before the current row
causal_feature_contract.weekly_snapshot: each Monday 12:00 UTC uses the latest common observation whose available_at is not later than the decision and whose age is <=3 days
causal_feature_contract.clip: each z feature clipped to [-5, 5] before model fitting

online_model_contract.target: unlevered log return from scheduled weekly entry open to exit open
online_model_contract.label_availability: a historical sample enters a refit only when both source available_at and scheduled label exit are <= current weekly decision
online_model_contract.training_window: most recent 104 fully labelled samples; require 52
online_model_contract.feature_standardization: mean and sample standard deviation fit on training samples only; zero-variance columns become zero
online_model_contract.target_centering: subtract training target mean and do not add it back to the forecast; this removes unconditional BTC drift
online_model_contract.estimator: closed-form L2 ridge beta=(X'X+10I)^-1 X'(y-mean(y)); no intercept
online_model_contract.abstention: trade only when abs(out-of-sample forecast) >= median absolute in-sample fitted centered forecast for that refit
online_model_contract.side: long for positive forecast, short for negative forecast, else flat
online_model_contract.refit: every Monday; no hyperparameter or feature selection

execution_contract.decision: Monday 12:00 UTC after feature snapshot is fixed
execution_contract.entry: Monday 12:05 UTC open (one complete five-minute latency bar)
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open 2,016 five-minute bars/seven days after entry
execution_contract.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle/abstained cash
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, favorable-before-adverse held OHLC, funding, entry/exit/hypothetical liquidation costs

controls.fee_family_only: same online model using the four fee/density features
controls.topology_family_only: same online model using the four breadth/fanout features
controls.stale_features_7d: all eight inputs delayed seven observations
controls.year_stratified_feature_permutation: permute feature rows within year before each deterministic refit
controls.constant_long: weekly long with the same execution clock
controls.one_bar_delayed_entry: same side one extra five-minute bar later
controls.mechanism_rejection_rule: reject NWE-7 if stale or permuted features independently pass every primary gate; component-only results are attribution, not replacements

orthogonality_after_performance.comparison_set: all promoted/live/shadow sleeves frozen before NWE-7

rejection_contract: any support, performance, mechanism, or orthogonality failure rejects NWE-7 without changing features, ridge, window, abstention, side, or hold
